name: self-improving-agent
tagline: Popular ClawHub skill (3.9k★): captures learnings, errors and corrections so the agent improves over time.
verdict: Trustworthy on security — it writes learnings to its own workspace for its stated purpose, not exfiltration. Docs have a small internal slip (hyphenated format vs underscored examples) and the main file runs a bit long, but nothing that misleads you.

highlights.summary: The stated Pattern-Key format says hyphenated, but the doc's own examples use underscores — a self-inconsistency.
588-line SKILL.md is over the ~500-line budget (still under 2×).
Writes learnings to workspace files for its declared purpose — not secret exfiltration (a weak evaluator over-flags this).
